title: calyptrocarya longifolia
intro: Calyptrocarya longifolia, also known as the redbrown sedge or redbrown needle sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calyptrocarya longifolia include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
